description_long: This is a semi-automatic handgun with a classic design reminiscent of the Colt M1911, featuring a matte black metal slide and frame paired with dark brown, checkered wooden grips. The slide is rectangular with subtle beveling along the edges and displays engraved markings, including manufacturer details and serial numbers. The grip panels are secured with visible screws and exhibit a diamond checkering pattern for enhanced hold. The trigger guard is rounded and robust, providing ample space for finger placement, while the trigger itself is skeletonized with three holes. The barrel is standard length, flush with the slide, and the front and rear iron sights are low-profile and integrated into the slide. The magazine base is flat and minimally protrudes from the grip, maintaining a streamlined profile.
description: A matte black semi-automatic handgun with checkered brown grips, engraved slide markings, and a flat magazine base. The design is classic and robust, with visible screws and low-profile sights.
description_view_0: Side view showing the engraved slide, checkered brown grip panels, and visible screws securing the grip.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the alignment of the slide, barrel, and low-profile iron sights.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the other grip panel, slide markings, and the overall slim profile of the handgun.
description_view_3: Muzzle view showing the barrel opening, front sight, and the width of the slide.
attribute_grip_design: The grip features dark brown wooden panels with a diamond-patterned checkering that provides a textured, non-slip surface. The panels are contoured to fit the hand comfortably and are secured with two visible screws on each side. The grip has a classic, straight profile without finger grooves or palm swells, and no visible logos or embellishments are present.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is rounded and moderately thick, offering a traditional, smooth contour with no undercuts or squared-off edges. It is integrated seamlessly into the frame, providing ample space for finger placement and lacking any additional texturing or reinforcement.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is of standard length, flush with the end of the slide, and has a smooth, non-threaded profile. There are no visible compensators, ports, or suppressor threads, and the exterior finish matches the matte black of the slide.
attribute_slide_markings: The slide features engraved markings on both sides, including manufacturer information, model designation, and a serial number. The engravings are subtle but legible, located towards the front and center of the slide, and are rendered in a simple, sans-serif font.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: The magazine base is flat and minimally protrudes from the bottom of the grip, maintaining a streamlined and flush appearance. There are no finger rests, flares, or visible logos, and the baseplate is smooth with a slight bevel at the edges for easier insertion and removal.
